MODULE: cosmos.integration.scrapers.crawlee
FILE: cosmos/integration/scrapers/crawlee.py (90 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Universal Scraper (Crawlee Integration)
--------------------------------------------------

"Info-sucking mosquitoes, go!"

This module uses Crawlee for Python (a port of the JS library) to robustly scrape
dynamic content from socials and streaming platforms. It handles retry logic
and browse

CLASSES:
- UniversalScraper
  Methods: async def scrape_social_profile(self, url: str) -> Dict
  Methods: async def scrape_video_metadata(self, url: str) -> Dict
